summary: Iteration 3 testing: AI Estimator end-to-end (mobile + desktop), SEO meta/robots/sitemap/manifest, lightweight perf checks. All 8 backend pytest tests passed (estimator API + SEO endpoints). Frontend mobile (390x844) form submission with Tipe=Bangun Baru/Kota=Surabaya/80m2/1 lantai/Standar successfully rendered result with all 5 breakdown categories, summary, assumptions, next steps. Desktop (1440x900) submission with Renovasi/Bali/120m2/2/Premium returned realistic Rp 672jt-1B (Rp 5.6-8.4jt/m2). WhatsApp CTA href contains wa.me/6282226817232 with estimasi payload. FloatingWhatsApp does NOT overlap submit button. Reset functional. Zero console errors. 6 lazy-loaded images detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it is referenced in create_estimate exception block (line 197 uses logger which is created at line 260). Works because of import-time vs call-time evaluation but is fragile — move logging.basicConfig + logger to top of module.
server.py: @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI — prefer lifespan handlers.
Estimator.jsx: city dropdown allows 'Lainnya' option but the backend has no special handling — minor, AI handles it gracefully.
index.html: canonical and og:url use https://timurdesign.com/ (production domain) which is correct for SEO, but page is currently served from preview URL — expected for staging.
seed_data_creation: None. Two estimates persisted in db.estimates as side-effect of AI calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_estimator_seo.py covers 4 estimator scenarios + 4 SEO endpoint checks. AI estimator takes 15-25s per call. WhatsApp number 6282226817232 verified in CTA href.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All requested features (mobile UX, SEO, lightweight perf, backend AI estimator) work as specified.
